pr_title: Add page slicing helper for the list API endpoints
pr_description: Adds get_page() to slice a result set into 1-indexed pages for the API's list endpoints.
injected_issue: get_page() computes end = start + page_size - 1 instead of start + page_size, so every slice is one item short of page_size and the last item of every page is silently dropped and never appears on any page.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: The tests only check the first item of a page and that overflow pages are empty; none of them assert the full page length or that the last item of a page range (e.g. item 5 or item 10) actually appears in the results.
